title: Cloud deployment package for FastAPI and React with Supabase
platform_target: Render-compatible Docker deployment with Supabase managed PostgreSQL and Supabase Auth
release_order: Create or verify the Supabase project and database connection string.
Configure backend environment variables and deploy the FastAPI backend.
Run the backend health check and migration verification.
Configure frontend build variables and deploy the React frontend.
Run one authenticated pilot smoke test from login through adaptive result.
rollback_rule: If backend health, auth, migration, lesson loading, session submission, or adaptive result retrieval fails, roll back the affected service before enrolling pilot learners.
